summary: Tested P0/P1 Command Center Submit/Save Draft button visibility and P1 Reports Module. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reports/available returns 13 canned reports
Backend: POST /api/reports/sla_compliance/generate returns report with summary (on_track, at_risk, breached, compliance_rate)
Backend: POST /api/reports/tickets_created/generate returns date/count data
Backend: POST /api/reports/stale_pending_review/generate returns pending review tickets
Backend: POST /api/reports/tickets_by_assignee/generate returns assignee distribution
Backend: POST /api/reports/open_ticket_aging/generate returns aging buckets (0-24h, 1-3d, 3-7d, 7-14d, 14d+)
Backend: POST /api/reports/{id}/export/csv returns CSV file with correct headers
Backend: POST /api/reports/{id}/export/pdf returns JSON data for frontend PDF generation
Backend: Report filters (date_from, date_to, sla_state) work correctly
Backend: Invalid report ID returns 404
Backend: All 13 reports generate successfully
Backend: GET /api/categories/l1 returns L1 categories
Backend: GET /api/categories/l2 returns L2 categories for given L1
Frontend: Command Center - Submit/Save Draft buttons HIDDEN before L1+L2 selection
Frontend: Command Center - Submit/Save Draft buttons HIDDEN after L1 only selection
Frontend: Command Center - Submit/Save Draft buttons VISIBLE after L1+L2 selection
Frontend: Reports page loads with Available Reports list
Frontend: Reports - SLA Compliance Summary generates with summary cards
Frontend: Reports - Tickets Created generates with Total Tickets summary
Frontend: Reports - Stale Pending Review generates with workflow status cards
Frontend: Reports - CSV export works (downloads file)
Frontend: Reports - PDF export works (generates PDF via jsPDF)
Frontend: Reports - Filters panel with date range, status, category, team, assignee
critical_code_review_comments: Reports module well implemented with 13 canned reports covering Volume, Aging, Performance, SLA, Distribution, Escalation, Workflow categories
CSV export uses StreamingResponse for efficient file delivery
PDF export returns JSON data for frontend jsPDF rendering - good separation of concerns
Command Center correctly hides Submit/Save Draft buttons until both L1 and L2 categories are selected
Report filters properly applied with RBAC-aware data filtering
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports module has 13 canned reports: tickets_created, tickets_closed, open_ticket_aging, avg_first_response, avg_resolution_time, sla_compliance, tickets_by_assignee, tickets_by_team, tickets_by_specialty, tickets_by_category, escalation_events, sla_policy_effectiveness, stale_pending_review. All support CSV export, PDF export returns JSON for frontend rendering. Command Center Submit/Save Draft buttons only visible after both L1 and L2 categories selected.
